steps.title: Substitute x = -6 into the function
steps.content:
We're given $h(x) = 7|x|$ and need to find $h(-6)$. Substitute $x = -6$ directly:

$$h(-6) = 7|-6|$$

steps.title: Evaluate the absolute value and multiply
steps.content:
The absolute value of $-6$ equals \$6$ (absolute value gives the non-negative distance from zero):

$$|-6| = 6$$

So:

$$h(-6) = 7 \cdot 6 = 42$$

That matches choice D — D is correct.
